function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_wwdt_window.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_wwdt_window
description: >
  Verifies the Windowed Watchdog Timer (WWDT) of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover correct service within the valid window (no reset), early-warning
  interrupt before the window opens, watchdog timeout reset (service missed),
  and window-violation reset (service outside permitted window).
checklist_ids:
  - WWDT-01
  - WWDT-02
  - WWDT-03
  - WWDT-04
test_names:
  - test_wwdt_normal_service
  - test_wwdt_early_warning_irq
  - test_wwdt_timeout_reset
  - test_wwdt_window_violation
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

wwdt_params:
  window_upper_pct: 75   # Window opens at 75% of timeout period
  window_lower_pct: 25   # Window closes at 25% (lower bound for service)
  timeout_cycles: 10000  # WWDT period in fast test mode
  early_warning_pct: 90  # Early-warning interrupt at 90% of timeout

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; WWDT in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    window_upper: 0x7F
    window_lower: 0x3F
    early_warning_enable: true
    description: Configure WWDT with 10000-cycle timeout, window, early-warning
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: WDGA_BIT
    description: Activate WWDT (hardware watchdog started)
  - step: 4
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 6500
    description: Wait until inside the permitted service window (25-75% of period)
  - step: 5
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: RELOAD_KEY | 0x7F
    description: Service WWDT within valid window (reload counter)
  - step: 6
    action: check_no_reset
    description: Verify reset_n has NOT been asserted after service in window
  - step: 7
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    early_warning_enable: true
    description: Reconfigure WWDT for early-warning test
  - step: 8
    action: wait_early_warning_irq
    irq_vector: 23
    timeout_cycles: 12000
    description: Wait for WWDT early-warning IRQ (IRQ23) to fire at 90% of period
  - step: 9
    action: check_irq
    irq_vector: 23
    description: Confirm WWDT early-warning IRQ asserted
  - step: 10
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 5000
    early_warning_enable: false
    description: Reconfigure WWDT with shorter timeout; disable early warning
  - step: 11
    action: do_not_service_wwdt
    description: Intentionally do NOT service WWDT; wait for timeout expiry
  - step: 12
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 6000
    description: Wait beyond WWDT timeout period
  - step: 13
    action: check_reset_asserted
    description: Verify reset_n asserted due to WWDT timeout (chip reset)
  - step: 14
    action: release_reset
    description: Re-release reset after watchdog reset for next sub-test
  - step: 15
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    window_lower: 0x3F
    description: Configure WWDT with lower window bound
  - step: 16
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: WDGA_BIT
    description: Activate WWDT
  - step: 17
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 1000
    description: Wait in the early (forbidden) zone before window opens
  - step: 18
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: RELOAD_KEY | 0x7F
    description: Attempt to service WWDT outside valid window (violation)
  - step: 19
    action: check_reset_asserted
    description: Verify window-violation triggers immediate chip reset

checks:
  - id: CHK-WWDT-01
    checklist_id: WWDT-01
    description: Service within valid window does not cause reset; counter reloads
    expected: reset_n remains high; WWDT counter reloads to 0x7F
  - id: CHK-WWDT-02
    checklist_id: WWDT-02
    description: Early-warning IRQ asserts at configured threshold before window
    expected: IRQ23 fires at ~90% of WWDT period
  - id: CHK-WWDT-03
    checklist_id: WWDT-03
    description: Missing WWDT service causes chip reset after timeout expires
    expected: reset_n asserted within 1 clock of WWDT counter reaching 0
  - id: CHK-WWDT-04
    checklist_id: WWDT-04
    description: Service attempted in forbidden zone triggers immediate chip reset
    expected: reset_n asserted within 1 clock of out-of-window service attempt

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-WWDT checks PASS
  - Reset observed only when expected (timeout or violation)
  - Early-warning IRQ fires before window opens in sub-test 2
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_wwdt_window
description: >
  Verifies the Windowed Watchdog Timer (WWDT) of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover correct service within the valid window (no reset), early-warning
  interrupt before the window opens, watchdog timeout reset (service missed),
  and window-violation reset (service outside permitted window).
checklist_ids:
  - WWDT-01
  - WWDT-02
  - WWDT-03
  - WWDT-04
test_names:
  - test_wwdt_normal_service
  - test_wwdt_early_warning_irq
  - test_wwdt_timeout_reset
  - test_wwdt_window_violation
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

wwdt_params:
  window_upper_pct: 75   # Window opens at 75% of timeout period
  window_lower_pct: 25   # Window closes at 25% (lower bound for service)
  timeout_cycles: 10000  # WWDT period in fast test mode
  early_warning_pct: 90  # Early-warning interrupt at 90% of timeout

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; WWDT in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    window_upper: 0x7F
    window_lower: 0x3F
    early_warning_enable: true
    description: Configure WWDT with 10000-cycle timeout, window, early-warning
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: WDGA_BIT
    description: Activate WWDT (hardware watchdog started)
  - step: 4
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 6500
    description: Wait until inside the permitted service window (25-75% of period)
  - step: 5
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: RELOAD_KEY | 0x7F
    description: Service WWDT within valid window (reload counter)
  - step: 6
    action: check_no_reset
    description: Verify reset_n has NOT been asserted after service in window
  - step: 7
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    early_warning_enable: true
    description: Reconfigure WWDT for early-warning test
  - step: 8
    action: wait_early_warning_irq
    irq_vector: 23
    timeout_cycles: 12000
    description: Wait for WWDT early-warning IRQ (IRQ23) to fire at 90% of period
  - step: 9
    action: check_irq
    irq_vector: 23
    description: Confirm WWDT early-warning IRQ asserted
  - step: 10
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 5000
    early_warning_enable: false
    description: Reconfigure WWDT with shorter timeout; disable early warning
  - step: 11
    action: do_not_service_wwdt
    description: Intentionally do NOT service WWDT; wait for timeout expiry
  - step: 12
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 6000
    description: Wait beyond WWDT timeout period
  - step: 13
    action: check_reset_asserted
    description: Verify reset_n asserted due to WWDT timeout (chip reset)
  - step: 14
    action: release_reset
    description: Re-release reset after watchdog reset for next sub-test
  - step: 15
    action: apb_configure_wwdt
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    window_lower: 0x3F
    description: Configure WWDT with lower window bound
  - step: 16
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: WDGA_BIT
    description: Activate WWDT
  - step: 17
    action: wait_cycles
    cycles: 1000
    description: Wait in the early (forbidden) zone before window opens
  - step: 18
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: WWDT0
    register: CR
    value: RELOAD_KEY | 0x7F
    description: Attempt to service WWDT outside valid window (violation)
  - step: 19
    action: check_reset_asserted
    description: Verify window-violation triggers immediate chip reset

checks:
  - id: CHK-WWDT-01
    checklist_id: WWDT-01
    description: Service within valid window does not cause reset; counter reloads
    expected: reset_n remains high; WWDT counter reloads to 0x7F
  - id: CHK-WWDT-02
    checklist_id: WWDT-02
    description: Early-warning IRQ asserts at configured threshold before window
    expected: IRQ23 fires at ~90% of WWDT period
  - id: CHK-WWDT-03
    checklist_id: WWDT-03
    description: Missing WWDT service causes chip reset after timeout expires
    expected: reset_n asserted within 1 clock of WWDT counter reaching 0
  - id: CHK-WWDT-04
    checklist_id: WWDT-04
    description: Service attempted in forbidden zone triggers immediate chip reset
    expected: reset_n asserted within 1 clock of out-of-window service attempt

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-WWDT checks PASS
  - Reset observed only when expected (timeout or violation)
  - Early-warning IRQ fires before window opens in sub-test 2
